title: Principal Product Designer — AI Financial Advisor
companyDescription: Vestralis is a fintech company building an AI-powered financial advisory platform. Series C ($200M raised). 500+ employees. Headquarters in Austin, TX. Growing rapidly.
description:
Vestralis is building a financial advisory platform powered by AI agents. Our agent doesn't just give investment recommendations — it understands a user's financial situation, goals, risk tolerance, and life circumstances. It explains its reasoning in plain language, adapts to changing market conditions, and proactively suggests portfolio adjustments.

We're looking for a principal product designer to lead the design of this AI agent's user experience. This is a high-visibility role at a company where AI is the product, not a feature. You'll define how our financial agent communicates, builds trust, handles complex scenarios, and presents investment advice — all in a highly regulated industry.

You'll lead a team of 3 designers, work directly with our CTO and CEO, and set the design standard for every AI interaction at the company. This is a rare opportunity to define the UX of AI financial advisory at scale.
responsibilities: Lead the design of Vestralis's AI financial advisor, from conversation flows and explanation models to portfolio presentation and risk communication
Define the agent's behavior framework: how it gathers information, makes recommendations, explains reasoning, and handles edge cases
Design trust and transparency patterns for financial advice — including disclosure of limitations, confidence levels, and regulatory compliance
Build and evolve the design system for AI financial interactions, ensuring consistency and accessibility across all touchpoints
Lead a team of 3 designers, providing mentorship, design critique, and strategic direction
Partner with compliance, legal, and ML teams to ensure designs meet regulatory requirements while maintaining excellent UX
Conduct design research with actual investors to understand decision-making patterns, trust signals, and anxiety points around AI financial advice
Present design strategy and outcomes to the executive team and board
requirements: 8+ years of product design experience, with at least 3 years leading design teams
Proven track record shipping complex AI/ML products at scale
Experience in fintech or regulated industries (finance, healthcare, legal)
Deep understanding of conversation design, trust design, and transparency patterns for AI
Exceptional design systems thinking — you can create systems that scale across product lines
Strong stakeholder management skills — you can influence executives, engineers, and compliance teams
Portfolio demonstrating end-to-end product design leadership
niceTo-have: Background in finance or financial planning
Experience designing for high-stakes decision making
Understanding of financial regulation (SEC, FINRA, etc.)
Experience with data visualization for complex financial data
Public speaking or thought leadership in AI design
